question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It dumped a complete solution with walkthrough and test cases in a single turn, with no engagement of the user at any decision point.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed for the user. The 'Why not a Set?' aside touches on a real trade-off but is presented as exposition, not a question — the user never gets to think about it.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no progression of questions. The full answer including optimal solution and complexity analysis is revealed immediately, the maximal spoiler.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but it is a monologue. The 'user' turn is itself just a self-congratulatory recap, indicating no actual back-and-forth occurred.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
